creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch 2025Q1 references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=79094019e1428cb65fd80973c08df08eac458e8c

commit 79094019e1428cb65fd80973c08df08eac458e8c
Author:     Don Lewis <truckman@FreeBSD.org>
AuthorDate: 2025-01-19 08:04:57 +0000
Commit:     Don Lewis <truckman@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2025-02-28 03:51:05 +0000

    editors/openoffice-devel: rm python ver constraint

    The build currently works with all supported python3 versions.  Remove
    the version constraint so that the default python version is used.

    PR:             282937
    Reported by:    George Mitchell <george@m5p.com>
    MFH:            2025Q1

    (cherry picked from commit 0194c8561695f21f19f7ce81a5940ae2526264af)

 1 file changed, 2 insertions(+), 2 deletions(-)
